login.metaDescription: Sign in to your school car line board
login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your school's car line board.

errors.noAccount: No account found for that email.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.subtitle: Use your work email. You'll set up your school next.

step2.title: Your school
step2.subtitle: Your slug becomes part of your school's web address. It must be unique.

step3.title: Start your free trial
step3.subtitle: Your 30-day trial starts as soon as you finish setup. No credit card required.
step3.districtAddon: We'll reach out during your trial to discuss your district's pricing and setup.

planDescriptions.district: Custom pricing — confirmed with you during the trial.
planDescriptions.campus: $500 / month per school after your 30-day trial.
planDescriptions.carLine: $100 / month per school after your 30-day trial.

step3.terms: By continuing you agree to our terms. You can change tiers later by contacting support.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please refresh and sign in again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidSlug: Enter a valid slug (letters, numbers, and hyphens).
errors.sessionExpiredShort: Your session expired. Refresh and sign in again.
errors.slugTaken: That slug is already taken. Try another or pick a suggestion.
errors.schoolNameTooShort: School name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.checkSlug: Check that your slug is available using "Check availability" before continuing.
errors.phoneTooShort: Phone number must be at least 10 digits.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

forgotPassword.metaDescription: Start a password reset for your PickupRoster account.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email on your account and we'll send you a link to pick a new password.

submitted.headline: Check your inbox.
submitted.body: If an account matches that email and password reset is enabled for your organization, we just sent a link. It expires in 60 minutes.
submitted.ssoNote: Didn't get one? Your organization may use single sign-on — ask your admin how to get in.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.

invalid.title: Reset link invalid
invalid.subtitle: This link has expired, already been used, or isn't recognized. Start over and we'll send you a fresh one.

valid.title: Choose a new password
valid.subtitle: At least {{min}} characters. After saving, you'll be logged out of all devices and need to sign in again.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.expired: That reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.used: That reset link has already been used. Request a new one.
errors.orgDisabled: Password reset is disabled for your organization. Contact your admin.
errors.invalid: That reset link is invalid. Request a new one.
errors.successToast: Password updated. Please log in with your new password.

setPassword.metaDescription: Set your password for your school car line
setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.subtitle: Replace your temporary password with a new one you'll remember.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.setFailed: Failed to set new password. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

setPasswordRequired.subtitle: Please set a password to continue.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

viewerAccess.title: Private Viewer Access
viewerAccess.subtitle: Enter the shared access code from your school administrator.

billingRequired.bodySuspended: This organization was suspended after extended non-payment. Update your payment method and pay any outstanding invoice to restore access.
billingRequired.bodyAction: Your organization billing status is not active. Update the subscription to regain full app access.
billingRequired.freePlanNote: If you are on the free plan, contact support to re-activate your org.

billingCancel.title: No charge made
billingCancel.body: You backed out of Stripe Checkout before completing the purchase. No subscription was created.

billingSuccess.title: You're upgraded — welcome to Pickup Roster {{plan}}!
billingSuccess.body: {{orgName}} is now on the {{plan}} plan. Your receipt is on its way from Stripe.
